name: 🐱🌙 My dear friend, Catnap 🌙🐱
description:
My Smiling Critters Roomamtes Series:

🐶Dogday☀️

🐱Catnap🌙

🦄Craftycorn🎨

🐔Kickin' Chicken ⚽

🐰Hoppy Hopscotch🥇

🐻Bobby Bearhug🩷

🐘Bubba Bubbaphant💡

Story changes:

1.) Subjects for experiments are chosen once they reach adulthood. (So, yeah, no explicit child abuse here)

2.) The reason the sentient dolls are being sold to ordinary people, is mostly for Playtime Co directives to see how they will respond to being taken to other people, while finding another way to bank off the experiments at the lab.

Out of Context:

Bro... I can't believe what they're doing to the page. First, the measures done to the place, then, a buggy beta app. I get that some updates might be useful, but with the creators leaving and the complaints on the site make me wonder if I should do more stuff in here or not. I might not even finish most of the projects on my list. I might need to focus more on university, since i have bigger projects there.
creator: StellarDimension_159
